name: chr17_olfactory_cluster
description: Olfactory receptor (OR) gene cluster on chr17p13.3, ~25 OR genes plus ~30 OR pseudogenes from the OR1, OR3 subfamilies. Lies near the subtelomere of chr17p. Although smaller than the chr1 and chr11 clusters, the chr17p13 cluster contains some of the highest-identity tandem OR duplicates in the human genome (multiple gene pairs >99% identical) and has documented copy-number variation.
expected_copy_count: ~25 functional OR genes + ~30 pseudogenes per haplotype; population CNV evidence at some sub-blocks
